notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, shortstop Isiah Kiner-Falefa to second baseman Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras. Gunnar Henderson to 3rd. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pete Alonso rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Pete Alonso grounds into a double play, shortstop Isiah Kiner-Falefa to second baseman Andruw Monasterio to first baseman Willson Contreras. Gunnar Henderson to 3rd. Adley Rutschman out at 2nd. Pete Alonso out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Gunnar Henderson reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Gunnar Henderson reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Willson Contreras. Jackson Holliday to 3rd. Taylor Ward to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Gunnar Henderson reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Willson Contreras. Jackson Holliday to 3rd. Taylor Ward to 2nd.
